content_body: Memorial Weekend 2008. Grandma came to visit from New York, so we thought we would leave Atlanta and enjoy the mountains. We loved this cabin, although we had to explain to our five year old that "this was mom's style of camping." He was expecting a "tent with sleeping bags." His disappointment was quickly forgotten once he boarded the Blue Ridge train! Looking forward to another visit again soon.
title: Memorial Weekend In North Georgia
